app.rdg: 1. Stab tihîlh lawha?
1. stab tiʔiɬ lawha?
1. What is faith?
Tihîlh lawha tolsherk sabaleku gwalh Sherk-Siam obechad al ku selechelh,
tiʔiɬ lawha tulʼ šəq sʔabalikʷ gʷəɬ šəq siʔab ʔubəčad ʔal kʷi shəliʔčəɬ,
the faith from heaven gift from sky nobleman ?? to the souls+our
Faith is a heavenly gift from God ??? for our souls
tlhdahu tlelduhchelh ku sgwas sgwadgwads dhual leglis.
ɬ(u)dəxʷ tɬildxʷ čəɬ kʷi sgʷaʔs sgʷadgʷads dxʷʔal leglis.
by+which we believe his own revelation to the church.
2. Elid gwalh lawha siayus.
2. ʔilid gʷəɬ lawha syayus.
2. Repeat the act of faith.
O Sherk-Siam dayai chahu, &c, page 9.
ʔu šəq-siʔab dayʼayʼ čəxʷ, &c, page 9.
3. Stab tihilh lespelans?
3. stab tiʔiɬ lespelans.
3. What is hope?
Tihîlh lespelans tolsherk sabaleku, gwalh Sherk-Siam obechad al ku selechelh,
tiʔiɬ lespelans tulʼ šəq sʔabalikʷ, gʷəɬ šəq siʔab ʔubəčad ʔal kʷi shəliʔčəɬ,
Hope is a heavenly gift from God ??? for our souls
tlhdahu kwerkrwels te rechchielh dhual kwi tlhdahu orchelh duhsherk,
tɬdəxʷ qʷiqʼʷils tə x̌əččəɬ dxʷʔal kʷi tɬdəxʷ ʔux̌ʷ dəxʷšəq,
truly? strengthen our minds unto the truly? ascending to heaven
'tlalba asista dhual kwi tlhdahu kwawhatobchelh a kwi Sherk-Siam.
ƛʼəlbəʔəsʔistəʔ dxʷʔal kʷi tɬdəxʷ kʷaxʷatəbčəɬ ʔə kʷi šəq siʔab.
?? until we are truly taken by God
4. Elid gwalh lespelans siyayus.
4. ʔilid gʷəɬ lespelans syayus.
4. Repeat the act of hope.
O Sherk-Siam gwa, &c. page 9.
ʔu šəq siʔab gʷə, &c. page 9.
5. Abil o whe gwas kwawhatobchelh a kwi Sherk-Siam,
5. ʔabilʼ ʔu xʷiʔ gʷəskʷaxʷatəbcəɬ ʔə kʷi šəq siʔab,
5. What if we aren't taken by God,
gula whe o la asared gwas halhilchelh aku telh dhual kwi gwa dahu orchelh duhsherk,
gʷəl xʷiʔ ʔu ləʔəsʔəx̌id gʷəshaʔɬilčəɬ ʔə kʷi təɬ dxʷʔal kʷi gʷədəxʷʔux̌ʷčəɬ dəxʷšəq,
then is there no way whereby we can become good so that we can ascend to heaven,
'tlalba asista whe la asared o kwi gwa dahu lililchelh tolal ku boku tskwadad?
ƛʼəlbəʔəsʔistəʔ xʷiʔ ləʔəsʔəx̌id ʔu kʷi gʷədəxʷlilčəɬ tulʼʔal kʷi bəkʼʷ dᶻəkʼʷadad?
or is there no way whereby we can distance ourselves from all of our sins?
E, abil whe gwas kwawhatobchelh a kwi Sherk-Siam
ʔi, ʔabilʼ xʷiʔ gʷəskʷaxʷatəbčəɬ ʔə kʷi šəq siʔab
Yes, if we aren't taken by God,
gula whe la asared gwas halhilchelh aku telh dhual kwi dahu orchelh duhsherk,
gʷəl xʷiʔ ləʔəsʔəx̌id gʷəshaʔɬilčəɬ ʔə kʷi təɬ dxʷʔal kʷi dəxʷʔux̌ʷčəɬ dəxʷšəq,
then there is no way whereby we can become good so that we can ascend to heaven,
'tlalba asista whe la asared kwi gwa dahu lililchelh tolal ku boku tskwadad.
ƛʼəlbəʔəsʔistəʔ xʷiʔ ləʔəsʔəx̌id kʷi gʷədəxʷlililčəɬ tulʼʔal kʷi bəkʼʷ dᶻəkʼʷadad
and is there no way whereby we can distance ourselves from all of our sins.
6. Ahutsotab o kwi Sherk-Siam tskwakredchelh go o'tegwid tsedîlh?
6. ʔəxʷcutəb ʔu kʷi šəq siʔab ckʼʷaqid čəɬ gʷ(ə)ut'igʷid cədiɬ?
6. Did God say that we should always pray to Him?
E, ahutsotab kwi Sherk-Siam tskwakredchelh go o'tegwid tsidîlh.
ʔi, ʔəxʷcutəb kʷi šəq siʔab ckʼʷaqidčəɬ gʷ(ə)ut'igʷid cədiɬ.
Yes, God did say that we should always pray to Him.
7. Stab tihîlh lasharite?
7. stab tiʔiɬ lasharite.
7. What is charity?
Tihîlh lasharite, tolsherk sabaleku gwalh Sherk-Siam obechad al ku selechelh
tiʔiɬ lasharite, tulʼ šəq sʔabalikʷ gʷəɬ šəq siʔab ʔubəčad ʔal kʷi shəliʔčəɬ,
Charity is a gift from heaven from God ??? to our lives,
tlhdahu ra'tleduhchelh ku Sherk-Siam, eku boku atsilhtalbihu.
ɬ(u)dəxʷ x̌aƛ'ildxʷ čəɬ kʷi šəq siʔab, ʔi kʷi bəkʼʷ ʔaciɬtalbixʷ.
whereby we love God and all people.
8. Elid gwalh lasharite siayus.
8. ʔilid gʷəɬ lacharite syayus.
8. Repeat the act of charity.
O Sherk-Siam dayai, &c. page 9.
ʔu šəq siʔab dayʼay, &c. pagə 9.
